description: Style NoteIf you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these black track pants from adidas belong in your wardrobe. The fabric is engineered with climacool technology which is breathable, and the waistband is soft for a more snug Fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool t-shirt and an excellent pair of sports shoes ready to hit the roadProduct DetailsBlack track pants  that has a comfortable elasticated waistband with inner drawstring, two zipped pockets on the sides, one welt pocket on the back, white Adidas three patented stripes below the knee, along the sides of the pant, mesh lining, white piping from the waist to the side pockets, brand name and logo appliqued below the left pocket and toggle straps at the hemsMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash below 30 degrees in cold water with ike colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, bleach, dry clean or tumble dryDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height:6' and waist:32") is wearing a size M
